judge: Claude Opus 4.6 — preview tools with screenshot evidence

touchTargets.detail: 44px min-height on all interactive elements at max-width:1024px

contradictionCard.detail: Terracotta border-l-4 border-l-[#d97757], warm bg-[#d97757]/5, title in terracotta, Investigate + Flag for Review buttons
contradictionCard.impact: Contradiction is now visually distinct attention magnet

bottomSheetAgent.detail: Agent spawned but not yet completed. Converting FastAgentPanel from full-screen overlay to 3-state bottom sheet on mobile.

dataWiring.detail: FounderDashboardView now uses resolvedCompany/resolvedInitiatives/resolvedAgents variables with DEMO fallback. SyncStatusBadge shows 'Local only'. useFounderPersistence hook exists (740 lines) but can't be called without ConvexProvider — when VITE_CONVEX_URL is set, swap resolvedCompany = DEMO_COMPANY to persistence.loadCompany().
dataWiring.convexReadiness: 85% — 30 tables, 40+ queries/mutations, persistence hook production-ready, zero views wired to it
dataWiring.blocker: founderPersistence.ts imports useConvexAuth at module level — importing it crashes Vite when ConvexProvider is absent. Need to lazy-import or check context before calling.

Weekly Reset / Pre-Delegation / Change Review mode switcher

P1: Wire useFounderPersistence when ConvexProvider is present (lazy import pattern)

verdict: PASS — P0 visual fixes verified with screenshot evidence. Mobile UX score improved from 4.4 to 5.8. Convex wiring scaffolded but blocked on lazy-import pattern. Bottom-sheet agent panel in progress.
